Item Details:

## signup-05

A simple signup form with social providers.

**Type:** registry:block
**Files:** 2 file(s)

visual_summary: A horizontal block displaying a social signup form with options to sign up via Facebook, Google, or Email. It is typically used on a login or signup page, providing a simplified and accessible way to create an account.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready block component with the following characteristics:

Name: signup-05
Description: A horizontal block displaying a social signup form with options to sign up via Facebook, Google, or Email. It is typically used on a login or signup page, providing a simplified and accessible way to create an account.
Style: light, flat
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: form, signup, social media

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
